title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Fyers

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Fyers
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
